sp_widget.name: IncentNow Configured Earning Rule
sp_widget.template:
Configured Earning Rules

{{rule.aggregation}}

{{rule.name}}

🗄️ Source.Field: {{rule.source}}.{{rule.field}}
Plan Name: {{rule.plan}}
Rollup: {{rule.earning_level}}
🔽 Conditions:
{{c.formatCondition(rule.condition)}}
SQL Preview:
SELECT {{rule.aggregation}}({{rule.field}}) as {{rule.name}}
FROM {{rule.source}}
WHERE
{{rule.condition}}

No Earning Rules Yet

Add earning rules to define how commission earnings are calculated from your data sources. Click "Add Earning Rule" above to get started.
